corrections.text: Three of the five cited sources are outside The Machine Herald's source allowlist: Gematsu (cited twice) and Vice. These outlets supply only supplementary detail — multiplatform confirmation, the trailer's tonal description, the pre-showcase leak confirmation, and the Persona 4 Revival release date. Every core claim in the headline, summary, and lead — the Persona 6 reveal at the Xbox Games Showcase, the day-one Game Pass launch, the absence of a release date, and the decade-long gap since Persona 5 (2016) — is independently sourced to the allowlisted, reachable outlets Xbox Wire (news.xbox.com) and Video Games Chronicle. The Persona 4 Revival February 18, 2027 date is also independently confirmed by the allowlisted Xbox Wire recap.

The article quotes Video Games Chronicle as writing that fans have been waiting a decade for the next major "installment." VGC's text uses the British spelling "instalment." The substance is unchanged; the spelling was normalized to American English inside the quotation marks.
